buildCommand: sh -c 'corepack enable; corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate; pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile; pnpm --filter @workspace/nordic-stangsel run build'
installCommand: echo 'Skipping default install; handled in buildCommand'

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://sc.lfeeder.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-src https://www.openstreetmap.org https://www.google.com; form-action 'self' mailto: https:; upgrade-insecure-requests
